scope.purpose: Define the specification for a governance_mutation_proof — an evidence record, generated alongside MERGE_PROOF, that binds a merged governance/workflow mutation back to the GMA (Governance Mutation Authorization) that authorized it. Closes the /execute -> /proof stage of GAP-005 for governance primitive mutations.

evidentiary_nature.note: The admission decision (GMA validity, governed_files_hash match, mutation_class coverage) is made exclusively by merge-governance-check.yml at PR-check time, per GOVERNANCE_MUTATION_AUTHORIZATION_SPEC.json. This artifact records, after the fact, which GMA (if any) was bound to a merged governance/workflow mutation. It does not re-validate, authorize, or block — it is evidence, not a second validator.

proof_id.description: Unique identifier for this governance mutation proof

merge_proof_id.description: Identifier of the corresponding MERGE_PROOF for the same merge event, binding the two records

canonical_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical_payload (deterministic JSON of pr_number, merge_commit_sha, merge_proof_id, governed_files_hash, mutation_classes, gma_id, decision_id, continuity_id, session_id, proof_status)

pr_number.description: GitHub PR number that was merged

merge_commit_sha.description: The exact commit SHA that entered main — same value bound in the corresponding MERGE_PROOF

mutation_classes.description: governance_mutation and/or workflow_mutation classes detected for this merged diff

governed_files_hash.description: governed_files_hash computed over the FULL governed-files set of the merged diff (governance/**, .github/workflows/**, src/**, schema.sql, migrations/**, wrangler.toml, governance/merge-legitimacy/merge_proof_registry.jsonl — excluding governance/authorizations/**), using the same algorithm and scope as GOVERNANCE_MUTATION_AUTHORIZATION_SPEC.json (governed_files_hash_input / governed_files_hash_scope), so it matches the hash the binding GMA was issued for

gma_id.description: Identifier of the gma_registry.jsonl entry whose (branch, governed_files_hash) matched this merge — null when proof_status is MISSING_AUTHORIZER

decision_id.description: decision_id from the bound GMA entry, or null when MISSING_AUTHORIZER

continuity_id.description: continuity_id from the bound GMA entry, or null when MISSING_AUTHORIZER

session_id.description: session_id from the bound GMA entry, or null when MISSING_AUTHORIZER

proof_status.description: GENERATED when a gma_registry.jsonl entry matching (branch, governed_files_hash, GMA_VALID, unexpired) was found and bound at proof-generation time. MISSING_AUTHORIZER when this PR's diff was classified as governance_mutation/workflow_mutation but no such entry could be located — recorded as evidence of a process anomaly for audit. Does not alter merge legitimacy, which was already decided at admission time.

applicability.rule: Generated only when the merged PR's diff (relative to its base) contains files classified as governance_mutation or workflow_mutation per classifyGovernedFiles + selectProofMutationClasses in governance/runtime/governance-mutation-proof.mjs (mirroring merge-governance-check.yml's full governed-paths classifier, excluding governance/authorizations/**). governed_files_hash is computed over the full governed-files set returned by classifyGovernedFiles, not just the governance_mutation/workflow_mutation subset, so it matches the hash merge-governance-check.yml used to select the GMA.
applicability.non_governance_prs: No governance_mutation_proof record is generated; only MERGE_PROOF is produced.

proof_storage_requirements.persistence: governance_mutation_proof must be proposed for durable, append-only registry storage through the same pull request that persists the corresponding MERGE_PROOF entry.
proof_storage_requirements.deduplication: proof_id must be unique per registry entry; appended in the same registry PR as the corresponding MERGE_PROOF entry, subject to the same idempotency checks (existing PR-by-proof_id / already-in-registry).
proof_storage_requirements.audit_access: Proof registry must be readable for lineage reconstruction without requiring runtime mutation access
proof_storage_requirements.retention: Proof must be retained for the lifetime of the repository to support retrospective audit

failure_semantics.no_matching_gma: proof_status = MISSING_AUTHORIZER; record still generated and persisted as evidence; does not fail the merge-proof job and does not affect MERGE_PROOF persistence

gap_005_closure.remaining_closure_addressed: Wires /execute -> /proof for governance mutations by generating and persisting governance_mutation_proof entries in merge_proof_registry.jsonl, bound to the authorizing GMA via gma_registry.jsonl.
gap_005_closure.observational_closure_pending: GAP-005 status remains PARTIAL until at least one real governance/workflow-mutation PR produces a persisted governance_mutation_proof entry with proof_status GENERATED in merge_proof_registry.jsonl.
